title: Creamy Argentinian Cassava Stir-fry
description: A hearty and indulgent herbal cream sauce with air-fried cassava cubes, perfect for a satisfying dinner or snack option.

ingredients.name: 2 medium cassava (yuca) roots
ingredients.notes: air-fry at 360°F for 8-10 minutes each side

instructions: Air-fry cassava cubes at 360°F for about 8-10 minutes on each side.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic and onion, cook until translucent.
Add bell pepper to the pan and continue cooking until slightly softened.
Stir in oregano, lime juice, heavy cream, and salt. Mix well.
Toss in air-fried cassava cubes into the sauce mixture.
Cook for another 5 minutes or until the mixture is heated through.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
